Both the Gatcha and the Free Select Lists, which are necessary or good things.
(Sorry to my poor English skill;_;)

Hello there ~

How far into the story did you get ?

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri

## Mode Specific

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
Normal : 3-7, Hard 1-5 and these are all i have

Okay : )

First of all, I recommand keeping your selector for later. Check if they expire, though.
That will allow you to try several teams first and find out what works best for you : poison, counter, discard, burst, ...

Next, I strongly suggest pulling for Saya in her specific banner as well as at least 1 copy of her wheel.

Cassiah is efficient when paired with discards team ( Aurita, Saya, Corposant, Faros or with a strong dps ( i.e. helot:catena ).
Celeste, Winkle and Faint give you some more sustainability. Caecus as well but he's more counter-oriented.

I would also suggest going for at least 1 copy of Pontos in his specific banner.

Further advice would require that you pull a bit more first and find 1 or 2 awakeners you really want to use.
Don't be too shy with your pulls : you will eventually want 5 functionnal teams.

Did you go through the whole rooster in Records > trial ( last tab ) ?
Also : Thaïs is great in any caro team and Liz can be interesting if you plan for poison ( i.e. Nymphaea ), though she takes more proficiency to properly handle.

Wow I so appreciate ur full advise, ur help threw away my worry from choosing the roosters. However,  in ur describes, I can't remind  the Records > trial in my language🤔 Is this about the roosters story chapters where can unlock new Silver Key powers? Or does it require more progress of story chapters?
Not great, but the best I could manage rn

These chapters require reality verge. Where I point you there's no ressource expenditure ( and you actually get some silver after each trial ) 

Glad I could help ✨
Ah now I see. Thank you.<:Celeste_agree:1400771815076528258>

4* Ramona, Ogir, Lotan, Doll.

I haven't put much resources in them, I want to, but I'm kinda afraid if they turn out to be falling hard and unusable in harder content.

Especially since Arc 2 format is kinda hard that even my best upgraded team is still struggling.
Can the original 4* member do well in harder content and Arc 2?
they are capable of beating everything on hard mode
this is with whale level investment mind you
they are not necessarily a good team
there are better teams

absolutely get 
Saya E1
Clem E1
Murphy E0

Since you have Pontos I’d E1, maybe push to E3 if you really like him

after that pull Clem/Murphy/Hameln’s wheels E0, then Saya’s wheel to E0
also

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Go to the thread below for helpful Beginner guides and Redemption codes 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1509396840330825758/1509396840330825758
if you can pass the read check you will learn everything you need

Additional Tips:
1. You need some kind of HP sustain, ideally from WOD or Relics. Because you can donate blood (HP) for some sigils if you're in short of cash for the relic you really need.
2. As the person above me mention, some units and teams scale better with relics (In Arcade mode you collect relics). The one I find so far is Arachne and Mouchette, they both have better performance with relics, and arachne especially with her personal relic.
3. When an option appear to choose relic and symptoms, check the symptom as well. Some symptoms are beneficial for your team instead of harmful, this depends on your characters and team. Just experiment and you'' learn which symptoms you want or don't want to pick next time.
4. Upgrade the talent that take seffetc in Astral reign, those effects are huge, even by the pure stats stick alone.
these are my wheels currently. what ones do you reccomend I pull rn?
also i just got clem. why do u reccomend her e3? Ive read it and im a bit too dumb to know why its worth

Clem exalt burns her stacks (forgot what they’re called) to either apply massive damage taken debuff or decrease damage dealt

E1 gives her a bunch of starting stacks and E3 let’s her generate more stacks every turn, but not the highest priority
for wheels E0 Clem wheel wouldn’t be a bad pickup
